name: orchestration
description: Codex orchestration skills for explicit subagent delegation and result consolidation.

interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for decomposing complex work, explicitly spawning focused subagents, waiting for results, and consolidating evidence, risks, tests, blockers, and next actions.
defaultPrompt: Use $orchestrate-subagents to review this branch against main.
Use $orchestrate-subagents to decompose this task and spawn focused subagents.
